title: HTI Toys Hot Shots Twin Catch It
description: Established in 1952, HTI is one of the UK’s largest independently owned designer and manufacturer of children’s toys, with 68 years’ experience supplying the world’s major retailers. With offices and showrooms in the UK, Hong Kong, Germany and China, a truly global business with a vision to be the first choice for innovative quality toys worldwide. Our products are designed to give children across the world the opportunity to have fun and grow through creative and imaginative play.
